creator: jlduran@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 191479
[PATCH] Update to version 2.7.7

security/acme.sh: Update to version 2.7.7

Changelog:

1. Most of the dns apis are updated to support ACME v2 wildcard cert.
2. Support DNS alias mode: https://github.com/Neilpang/acme.sh/wiki/DNS-alias-mode
3. More dns apis are integrated.
4. A lot of bug fixings
